title: Bartenders Utility
description: A bartenders weaponry and defence mod.
body:
Bartenders Utility is a mod i made for BCSMP S8 

Bartenders Longsword:

Takes damage from the last 10 seconds and converts it into knockback and damage

Bartenders Axe:

Throwable Axe that does damage and stays inside the player, if you hit the player while its inside someone it does x0.5 extra damage

Bartenders Scythe:

A Mace Item used to summon down an orbital strike after 1.5 seconds.

Bartenders Monolith:

When placed down everyones enchants are disabled in a 25 block radius

Bartenders Transporter:

Save points in your minecraft world and teleport to them with the downside of getting sickness for 10 seconds
